title: Fix CI: install Bun before npm run build
prompt:
CI is failing on PR #27 with `bun: command not found` / `sh: bun: not found` (exit 127). The web build (npm --prefix web-ui run build) succeeds, then `npm run build` calls `bun scripts/build.mjs`, but the CI runners only set up Node — Bun is never installed. The runtime is now Bun-only.

Fix: add a Bun setup step (oven-sh/setup-bun@v2) BEFORE the "Build" step in the affected workflows so `bun` is on PATH on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest.

Affected workflows (all run `npm run build` with no Bun setup):
- .github/workflows/test.yml (the failing one — build-check-test matrix, ubuntu + macos)
- .github/workflows/build-release.yml (Build package)
- .github/workflows/publish.yml (Build and validate package)

Pin a specific Bun version rather than latest for reproducibility. Verify by re-running the failed CI checks (gh pr checks 27) or pushing the branch. Do not change build.mjs — the build step is correct; only CI environment setup is missing.
